project_type: Next.js monorepo with pnpm workspaces and turbo
build_system: pnpm + turborepo, uses workspace:* protocol for internal deps
verification_instructions: Run pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm build - all must pass with zero errors
environment_constraints: Node >=22, pnpm 10.28.1. No Docker daemon needed for this task.
contribution_requirements: No @ts-ignore or @ts-expect-error. All typecheck (111/111), build (88/88), test (114/114) must continue to pass.
key_patterns: Packages export from src/index.ts. Apps use Next.js app router (src/app/) for core 7 apps. Remaining apps use pages-only pattern. @quant/common contains shared utilities. @quant/shared-ui contains shared React components. Next.js configs are in next.config.mjs (some use module.exports, some use export default). An existing sanitizeHtml in @quant/common/src/utils.ts only escapes HTML entities - it does NOT allow safe HTML through (it is an escape function, not a sanitizer). For this task we need isomorphic-dompurify to allow safe HTML rendering while stripping XSS.
directory_structure: Root monorepo: apps/ (16 apps, 7 are Next.js app-router), packages/ (70+ shared packages), services/. The 7 Next.js app-router apps that already have error.tsx: quantai, quantchat, quantdocs, quantdrive, quantmeet, quantcalendar, quantmail. Apps without src/app/: quantads, quantedits, quantmax, quantneon, quantsync, quantube, status, marketing, quant-mobile (these use pages-only or non-Next.js patterns).
